mediaPage.title: MEDIA
mediaPage.description: At BORAN CARE ASIA, we are committed to creating innovative, high-quality, and sustainable skincare solutions inspired by Khmer nature and backed by modern science.

videoPage.title: VIDEO
videoPage.description: At BORAN CARE ASIA, we share our journey through videos, showcasing our innovative skincare solutions inspired by Khmer nature and modern science.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To become Cambodia's leading green beauty manufacturer by creating innovative, high-quality, and sustainable skincare products inspired by Cambodia's natural resources.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To develop safe and high-quality skincare products by combining natural ingredients with modern science, while providing reliable OEM/ODM services that empower brands to grow successfully.

naturalPurity.title: Natural Purity
naturalPurity.description: We use carefully selected, ethically sourced natural ingredients, combining Cambodia's botanical resources with advanced skincare technology to create safe and effective beauty solutions.

trustedQuality.title: Trusted Quality
trustedQuality.description: Every product formula undergoes rigorous testing to meet international standards of safety and quality, ensuring confidence for both our business partners and consumers.

partnershipGrowth.title: Partnership Growth
partnershipGrowth.description: Through our reliable OEM/ODM services, we support our partners' success by delivering flexible, scalable, and innovative manufacturing solutions.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.success: Thank you! Your message has been sent successfully.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
contact.address:
Pongro Village, 
Sangkat Kampong Svay, 
Serei Saophoan City, 
Banteay Meanchey Province, Cambodia

about.heading: ABOUT US
about.intro: We work with entrepreneurs, brands, and organizations to bring their product ideas to life through a structured and scalable manufacturing process.
about.description: is a Cambodia-based green beauty OEM/ODM manufacturer, turning natural ingredients and science-driven formulation into scalable skincare, body care, hair care, and facial care products — helping brands bring their vision to life since 2019.

founder.heading: FOUNDER & CEO
founder.subHeading: Our Chairwoman of the Boran Care Company
founder.name: Nhim Sorida
founder.quote: A genuine Cambodian brand should never rely on pity or understanding by casting itself as the underdog. Rather, it should be founded on confidence and command authentic respect.

csr.aboutDescription: At BORAN CARE ASIA, we are committed to creating innovative, high-quality, and sustainable skincare solutions inspired by Khmer nature and backed by modern science.
csr.heading: CORPORATE SOCIAL RESPONSIBILITY
csr.description: "Care & Share" represents our commitment to giving back to the community by providing students with essential school supplies, educational materials, and care packages that support their education and well-being.

items.text1: "Care & Share" is one of our CSR initiatives dedicated to supporting local communities through educational assistance and social contributions.
items.text2: We believe that investing in education creates opportunities for future generations and contributes to sustainable community development.

items.text1: Our team works closely with schools and local organizations to provide meaningful support where it is needed most.
items.text2: Every contribution reflects our commitment to compassion, responsibility, and making a positive impact on society.

items.text1: Corporate Social Responsibility is an important part of our company culture, guiding us to create value beyond business.
items.text2: Together with our employees and partners, we strive to build a healthier, stronger, and more caring community.

p1.name: Natural Mini Soap 100g
p1.description: Handmade using 100% natural, sustainably sourced ingredients. Made in Banteay Meanchey, Cambodia by Boran Care, a women-led brand built on a formulation philosophy of natural, safety, efficiency, and sustainability.

p3.name: Natural Shampoo 300ml
p3.description: BORAN CARE Herbal Shampoo is developed to gently cleanse the scalp while helping maintain healthy-looking hair. The formula combines natural ingredients with modern cosmetic science to provide a refreshing cleansing experience suitable for regular use.
benefits: Gently removes dirt and excess oil.
Leaves hair feeling soft and refreshed.

ingredients.name: Silk-inspired formulation
ingredients.desc: inspired by Boran Care’s silk sericin research

p7.name: Anti Wrinkle Cream
p7.description: BORAN CARE Anti-Wrinkle Cream is designed to help nourish and moisturize the skin while supporting a smoother-looking complexion. The lightweight formula is suitable for daily skincare routines and reflects the company's focus on combining science with natural ingredients.

ingredients.name: Hyaluronic Acid
ingredients.desc: A powerful humectant that draws deep moisture into the skin barrier, keeping it plump and highly hydrated.

ingredients.name: Collagen
ingredients.desc: Works to support the skin's natural framework, visibly improving firmness, springiness, and texture.

ingredients.name: Silk Cocoon Extract (SOURINA Line)
ingredients.desc: Rich in natural sericin protein to form a protective moisture shield and noticeably soften aging skin.

p5.name: Kaffir Lime Scrub 300g
p5.description: EK Beauty Kaffir Lime Body Scrub combines the potent cleansing power of natural Cambodian kaffir lime with skin-polishing botanical extracts. It naturally lifts away dead skin cells, targets uneven tone, and reveals intensely soft, glowing skin with a lingering fresh, refreshing herbal aroma.

ingredients.name: Kaffir Lime Peel & Extract:
ingredients.desc: High in volatile oils and natural AHAs to safely brighten, deeply cleanse, and refine skin texture.

ingredients.name: Honey:
ingredients.desc: Actively locks in hydration, acts as a natural antibacterial barrier, and ensures the skin feels silky post-scrub.

ingredients.name: Botanical Seed Oils:
ingredients.desc: Deeply nourishes the skin layer so it feels intensely conditioned and flexible, rather than stripped or tight.

p6.name: natural Lip Balm 5g
p6.description: BORAN CARE Lipstick delivers vibrant color with a smooth finish while helping keep lips comfortable throughout the day. The formula is designed for easy application and everyday wear
benefits: Backed by ITC lab quality testing

ingredients.desc: Helps keep lips soft and moisturized.

ingredients.name: Natural waxes
ingredients.desc: Provide a smooth texture and comfortable application.

ingredients.name: Plant-based oils
ingredients.desc: Help prevent lips from feeling dry.

p2.name: SILK SOAP 75g & 100g
p2.description: Silk Soap is a handcrafted facial cleansing bar formulated with naturally derived ingredients to gently cleanse, refresh, and soften the skin. Its rich, creamy lather removes impurities while helping maintain the skin's natural moisture, leaving your complexion feeling clean, smooth, and revitalized after every wash.
benefits: Gentle cleansing for daily facial care.
Helps remove dirt, oil, and impurities.
Leaves skin feeling soft and smooth.
Maintains the skins natural moisture balance.

ingredients.name: Natural Soap Base
ingredients.desc: Gently cleanses the skin without harsh detergents.

ingredients.name: Silk Extract
ingredients.desc: Helps keep the skin feeling soft and smooth.

ingredients.name: Glycerin
ingredients.desc: Helps retain moisture and prevent dryness.
